transport_options.description: SkyTrain Stadium–Chinatown Station (2 min walk)
Multiple routes to downtown Vancouver
15-minute walk from downtown core

description: BC Place is Canada's largest covered stadium, located in the heart of downtown Vancouver. Retractable roof ensures all-weather comfort. Steps from SkyTrain.

transport_options.description: Link Light Rail — Stadium Station (adjacent)
King County Water Taxi from West Seattle
Metro routes 21, 37, 50

description: Lumen Field sits on Seattle's waterfront in the SODO district. Known for its loud atmosphere and covered lower bowl. Light Rail stops right outside.

transport_options.description: VTA Light Rail — Great America Station (adjacent)
Caltrain to Mountain View + shuttle
Official shuttles from Santa Clara Caltrain

nearby_zones: Great America Theme Park Fan Zone
description: Levi's Stadium is home to the San Francisco 49ers, located in Silicon Valley's Santa Clara. Modern open-air venue with natural grass and excellent sightlines.

transport_options.description: Metro C Line (Green) — Hawthorne/Lennox Station + shuttle
Official game day shuttles from LAX and Hollywood Park
Dedicated Uber/Lyft drop-off zone on Prairie Ave

description: SoFi Stadium is the most expensive stadium ever built, featuring a translucent roof and cutting-edge technology. Located at Hollywood Park in Inglewood, near LAX.

transport_options.description: Macrobús Rapid Transit Line 1 — Zapopan stop
Taxi or ride-share from Guadalajara city centre
Official World Cup shuttles from Guadalajara TUA terminal

description: Estadio Akron is home to Chivas de Guadalajara, located in Zapopan. A modern bowl with an iconic curved roof, surrounded by suburban Guadalajara.

transport_options.description: Metro Line 2 — Tasqueña + Tren Ligero to Estadio Azteca
Metrobús Line 3 — Estadio Azteca station
Taxi or Uber from CDMX centre — allow extra time on match days

description: Estadio Azteca is one of football's most iconic venues. The only stadium to host two World Cup finals (1970 and 1986). Located in Coyoacán, Mexico City.

transport_options.description: Monterrey Metro Line 1 — General Anaya + shuttle
Metrorrey bus services from Monterrey city centre
Taxi or DiDi from downtown Monterrey

description: Estadio BBVA is one of Latin America's most modern stadiums, home to CF Monterrey. Spectacular mountain backdrop with Cerro de la Silla visible from all seats.

transport_options.description: METRORail Red Line — Reliant Park/NRG Station (adjacent)
METRO routes 9, 11, 40
Uber/Lyft drop-off on Murworth Drive

description: NRG Stadium is a multipurpose domed stadium in the Texas Medical Center area. Retractable roof allows play in any weather. Home of the Houston Texans.

transport_options.description: Official shuttles from Dallas Convention Centre and Irving
Uber/Lyft — designated drop-off on Road to Six Flags
Trinity Railway Express + shuttle from CentrePort/DFW Airport

description: AT&T Stadium is one of the world's largest domed stadiums with a retractable roof and a massive video board. Home of the Dallas Cowboys. Largest venue in the 2026 World Cup.

transport_options.description: KC Streetcar extension shuttles from Crown Center
RideKC game day express buses from Union Station
Uber/Lyft — Gate A drop-off zone

description: Arrowhead Stadium is one of the loudest stadiums in the world, home of the Kansas City Chiefs. Open-air bowl with a passionate atmosphere in the Midwest.

transport_options.description: MARTA Red/Gold Lines — Vine City or GWCC/CNN Center stations
MARTA bus routes 3, 12, 14
10-minute walk from CNN Center and Downtown Atlanta

description: Mercedes-Benz Stadium features a unique retractable roof that opens like a camera lens and a 360-degree halo videoboard. Located in downtown Atlanta next to State Farm Arena.

transport_options.description: Official shuttles from Aventura Mall and Downtown Miami
Broward County Transit routes 22, 52
Uber/Lyft — NW 199th Street drop-off

description: Hard Rock Stadium is home to the Miami Dolphins and hosts major international events. Located in Miami Gardens with an open-air design suited to South Florida's climate.

transport_options.description: TTC 509 Harbourfront or 511 Bathurst to Exhibition Loop
TTC 29 Dufferin to Exhibition
15-minute walk from Union Station via the Waterfront Trail

description: BMO Field is Canada's national soccer stadium, home of Toronto FC. Located at Exhibition Place on Lake Ontario waterfront with stunning views of the Toronto skyline.

transport_options.description: MBTA Commuter Rail — Foxboro Station (adjacent, game days only)
Official shuttles from Providence and Mansfield MBTA stations
Uber/Lyft — Patriot Place designated drop-off

description: Gillette Stadium is home of the New England Patriots and New England Revolution. Located in Foxborough, 30 miles south of Boston, with the Patriot Place entertainment complex adjacent.

transport_options.description: SEPTA Broad Street Line — Pattison Station (adjacent)
SEPTA routes G and 17 from Center City
10-minute walk from Wells Fargo Center and Citizens Bank Park

description: Lincoln Financial Field is home of the Philadelphia Eagles, located in the South Philadelphia Sports Complex alongside Citizens Bank Park and Wells Fargo Center.

transport_options.description: NJ Transit — Meadowlands Rail Line from Secaucus Junction (10 min)
NJ Transit game day express buses from Port Authority, NYC
Official shuttles from Times Square and Penn Station

description: MetLife Stadium is the largest venue in the 2026 World Cup and will host the Final. Located in the New Jersey Meadowlands, shared by the NY Giants and NY Jets, 8 miles from Manhattan.
